entries.rationale: Preserve the login URL and redirect parameter, but perform navigation only through an explicitly injected optional web navigation service.
Preserve URL construction while isolating browser navigation and capability checks behind the web adapter.
Retain the app-or-host-bound anonymous session flow using adapter-private cookie proof and no JavaScript-readable credential.
Retain server-authoritative anonymous ownership promotion through the shared app transport.
Retain generic magic-link requests while treating email and link tokens as sensitive request fields.
This is a Holm-owned browser confirmation page reached from an emailed link, not a route the SDK should invoke directly.
Retain token or email-and-key completion through the shared app transport with sensitive payload redaction.
Retain server-side session invalidation and reset caller-partitioned resources after success.
Retain list and create operations through shared cache, error, and mutation-invalidation behavior.
Preserve the import route while moving file transfer to the standards-based resumable upload seam with an isolated multipart fallback.
Retain detail, update, and revoke operations while encoding path segments and sharing transport error semantics.
Retain the reserved app-runtime identity route as a caller-partitioned auth resource.
